race.description: Kirks Bridge Farm Showcase Maiden Plate
race.comment: ANGEL CITY (6) went close at Wyong and then wasn't fancied in a decent contest at Canberra. Ran a strong number this track/trip last time in work and will be tough to beat stepping up from a sprint. AMARILLO SKY (1) had trialled well but looked a run short over 1300m at Hawkesbury first-up. Impressed prior on debut and will jump and run from the inside gate. Fitter and a player. ASTOUND BEAUTY (7) is a likely improver who will be around the mark. TARQUINIUS (5) has raced just once and that was four-and-a-half months ago but has been readied with two trials. Keep safe.
